mapper.select: SELECT mo.id, mo.merchant_id, mo.account, mo.password_hash, mo.name, mo.operator_type, mo.shop_scope_type, mo.status AS operator_status, m.status AS merchant_status, m.audit_status, m.region FROM merchant_operator mo JOIN merchant m ON m.id = mo.merchant_id WHERE LOWER(mo.account) = LOWER(#{account}) AND mo.is_deleted = FALSE AND m.is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT mo.id, mo.merchant_id, mo.account, mo.password_hash, mo.name, mo.phone, mo.email, mo.operator_type, mo.shop_scope_type, mo.status AS operator_status, m.status AS merchant_status, m.audit_status, m.region FROM merchant_operator mo JOIN merchant m ON m.id=mo.merchant_id WHERE mo.id=#{operatorId} AND mo.is_deleted=FALSE AND m.is_deleted=FALSE

SELECT mo.id, mo.merchant_id, mo.account, mo.password_hash, mo.name, mo.phone, mo.email, mo.operator_type, mo.shop_scope_type, mo.status AS operator_status FROM merchant_operator mo WHERE mo.id=#{operatorId} AND mo.merchant_id=#{merchantId} AND mo.is_deleted=FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO merchant(account, company_name, contact_name, contact_phone, region, audit_status, status, is_deleted) VALUES(#{account}, #{companyName}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{region}, #{auditStatus}, #{status}, FALSE)

INSERT INTO merchant_operator( merchant_id, account, password_hash, name, phone, email, operator_type, shop_scope_type, status, is_deleted ) VALUES( #{merchantId}, #{account}, #{passwordHash}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{operatorType}, #{shopScopeType}, #{operatorStatus}, FALSE )
mapper.select: SELECT id,code,name,permissions FROM merchant_role WHERE status=1 ORDER BY id
SELECT mr.id,mr.code,mr.name,mr.permissions FROM merchant_role mr JOIN merchant_operator_role mor ON mor.role_id=mr.id WHERE mor.operator_id=#{operatorId} AND mr.status=1 ORDER BY mr.id
SELECT shop_id FROM merchant_operator_shop WHERE operator_id=#{operatorId} ORDER BY shop_id
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM shop WHERE merchant_id=#{merchantId} AND is_deleted=FALSE AND id IN #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE merchant_operator SET status=#{status},updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{operatorId} AND merchant_id=#{merchantId} AND operator_type=2 AND is_deleted=FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM merchant_operator WHERE merchant_id=#{merchantId} AND operator_type=2 AND is_deleted=FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE merchant_operator SET name=#{name},phone=#{phone},email=#{email},shop_scope_type=#{shopScopeType},updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{operatorId} AND merchant_id=#{merchantId} AND operator_type=2 AND is_deleted=FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT id, merchant_id, license_url, legal_person, shop_photo_urls, status, reject_reason, submitted_at, audited_at, updated_at FROM merchant_application WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO merchant_application( merchant_id, license_url, legal_person, shop_photo_urls, status, reject_reason, submitted_at ) VALUES( #{merchantId}, #{licenseUrl}, #{legalPerson}, #{shopPhotoUrls}, 0, '', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE merchant_application SET license_url = #{licenseUrl}, legal_person = #{legalPerson}, shop_photo_urls = #{shopPhotoUrls}, status = 0, reject_reason = '', audit_by = 0, submitted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, audited_at = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId}
UPDATE merchant SET audit_status = #{auditStatus}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{merchantId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.sql: ma.id, ma.merchant_id, m.account AS merchant_account, m.company_name, m.region, ma.license_url, ma.legal_person, ma.shop_photo_urls, ma.status, ma.reject_reason, ma.submitted_at, ma.audited_at, ma.updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE merchant_application SET status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{reason}, audit_by = #{adminId}, audited_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND status = 0
